channel.title: golang on Patrick Armengol
channel.description: Recent content in golang on Patrick Armengol

item.title: Golang Learning Plan
item.description: Why Golang (yes I’m going to call it golang because it makes it easier to search and because I associate the word go with the board game) is a nice language. It seems simple but capable. I want to use it to dive deeper into the world of systems programming. Up until now I have been using python for basically anything and everything and I’m quite comfortable with it, but it often doesn’t really feel like the best tool for the job.
